overall.description: First-person perspective walk through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city at night, featuring intense neon lighting, holographic advertisements, and futuristic architecture. The scene transitions from a covered sidewalk with pink neon accents to a wide intersection with heavy visual effects and reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon-lit building facade

events.description: pedestrian walks past on the left side moving in opposite direction
approaching the intersection, ambient light increases from surrounding neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside a building with prominent vertical pink neon strips, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building wall with vertical magenta neon light strips casting reflections on the wet ground
elevated walkway spanning the street with illuminated structural supports
large holographic advertisements and glowing neon signs on distant building facades
dark sedan with bright headlights parked or moving slowly along the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beside a building with striking vertical pink neon lighting. The wet pavement reflects the colorful neon glow. A pedestrian passes by on the left while the camera approaches an intersection with digital billboards and an overhead pedestrian bridge visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy cyberpunk intersection with crosswalks and holographic advertisements

events.description: exits the covered sidewalk and enters the open intersection with expanded visibility
futuristic vehicle passes by on the right side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection surrounded by towering buildings covered in holographic displays and neon signage

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
tall commercial buildings with blue and cyan neon lighting and large digital facades
futuristic traffic light pole with illuminated pedestrian signals

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide cyberpunk intersection with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings. The camera crosses the striped crosswalk while a vehicle passes on the right, surrounded by towering structures covered in holographic advertisements and colorful digital signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, neon-lit corridor into the expansive heart of a rain-slicked cyberpunk intersection. It begins along a covered sidewalk where vertical pink neon lights cast a vibrant glow across the wet pavement as a pedestrian passes by. As the camera advances, the enclosed space opens up toward a distant pedestrian bridge and towering digital billboards. The scene then expands into a wide intersection, crossing a striped crosswalk while a vehicle glides past on the right. Finally, the perspective is enveloped by a canyon of towering structures draped in holographic advertisements and shimmering digital signage reflecting off the saturated asphalt.
